## 🚀 JobFlow v0.3.0 - Major LLM Provider Support

**AI-powered job tracking extension with support for all major LLM providers!**

### 📥 Quick Install
- **Chrome**: Download `jobflow-chrome-v0.3.0.zip` → [Install Instructions](INSTALL.md#chrome-installation-recommended)
- **Firefox**: Download `jobflow-firefox-v0.3.0.zip` → [Install Instructions](INSTALL.md#firefox-installation)

### ✨ What's New
- 🤖 **Multiple LLM Providers**: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Perplexity, + Ollama
- 🎯 **Smart Provider Selection**: Extension automatically uses your configured provider
- 🔧 **Enhanced Settings UI**: Easy setup with helpful links to get API keys
- 🐛 **Bug Fixes**: Resolved profile skills input and parameter binding issues
- ⚡ **Performance**: Faster extraction with reduced delays

### 🛠 Supported LLM Providers
- **OpenAI**: GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, GPT-3.5-turbo
- **Anthropic**: Claude-3.5-Sonnet, Claude-3.5-Haiku  
- **Google Gemini**: Gemini-1.5-Pro, Gemini-1.5-Flash
- **Perplexity**: Sonar-Pro, Sonar-Reasoning
- **Ollama**: Any local model (Qwen2.5, Llama3, etc.)

### 🎯 Perfect For
- 💼 **Job seekers** tracking applications across multiple sites
- 📊 **Data-driven candidates** who want insights into their job search
- 🚀 **Tech professionals** who prefer local/private AI tools

### 🔒 Privacy First
- All data stays in your browser (IndexedDB storage)
- No data sent to external servers except your chosen LLM provider
- Export your data anytime as SQLite database

### 📋 What's Included

**Chrome Package** (`jobflow-chrome-v0.3.0.zip`):
- Manifest V3 for Chrome
- Full dashboard with analytics
- All LLM provider integrations
- Auto-update ready for Chrome Web Store

**Firefox Package** (`jobflow-firefox-v0.3.0.zip`):  
- Manifest V2 for Firefox
- Same features as Chrome version
- Temporary install (until official AMO release)

**Source Code** (`jobflow-source-v0.3.0.zip`):
- Complete TypeScript/Preact source
- Build instructions included
- MIT Licensed

### 🚦 Installation Status
- ✅ **Manual Install**: Ready now (this release)
- 🔄 **Chrome Web Store**: Submission in progress  
- 🔄 **Firefox Add-ons**: Submission in progress
